recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua(5,5): error TLUA4110: Tuple type arguments circularly reference themselves.
recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua(5,9): error TLUA2536: Type 'number' cannot be used to index type 'Recur<T>'.
recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua(8,12): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua(8,13): error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua(8,23): error TLUA100035: A '...' expression is only allowed inside a vararg function.
recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua(8,26): error TLUA1005: ']' expected.
recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua(8,27): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua(12,37): error TLUA2589: Type instantiation is excessively deep and possibly infinite.


==== recursiveIndexedAccessSimplification.tlua (8 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/issues/63270
    
    type Recur<T> =
        (T extends  (unknown[]) ? {} : { [K in keyof T]?: Recur<T[K]>}) |
        [...Recur<T>[number][]];
        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA4110: Tuple type arguments circularly reference themselves.
            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2536: Type 'number' cannot be used to index type 'Recur<T>'.
    
    function join<T>(l: Recur<T>[]): Recur<T> {
        return ['marker', ...l];
               ~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
                ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
                          ~~~
!!! error TLUA100035: A '...' expression is only allowed inside a vararg function.
                             ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ']' expected.
                              ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
    }
    
    function a<T>(l: Recur<T>[]): void {
        local x: Recur<T> | undefined = join(l);
                                        ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2589: Type instantiation is excessively deep and possibly infinite.
    }
